title: Complete ESP32-S3 Renode execution model
description: Replace the skeletal ESP32-S3 surrogate behavior used by Heltec V3 and T-Deck with correct ELF address mapping, executable CPU behavior, UART, interrupts/timers, SPI/GPIO, and SX1262 integration sufficient for canonical LICHEN applications.
acceptance_criteria: Canonical Heltec V3 and T-Deck bridge/gateway plus Heltec puck ELFs load without unmapped segments and reach app-specific late markers with independently observed simulator TX; model limits are documented; no surrogate result is called physical proof.
close_reason: Renode ESP32-S3 model completed per parent cy6c and 5ix1.4.7 characterization. Memory map now covers all ELF segments (lowmem@0x0, expanded ROM/SRAM, xipFlash@0x42000000). UART, timers, SPI, SX1262 integration reaches late markers + independent TX oracles on Heltec/T-Deck ELFs. DTS/Kconfig updated for peripherals (timers, BT HCI, flash partitions, SX1262 pinctrl). Packaging dep satisfied (intelhex in builder env). Model limits documented in README. No surrogate claims. Thorough Renode + west + readelf tests passed. Closes fan-out.
